message:
refactor(workflows): move trigger_event_types to trait and enforce enabled config

Default workflows.enabled to empty vec (meaning all built-in workflows)
instead of a hardcoded allowlist. Add trigger_event_types() to Workflow
trait, removing the hardcoded match table from main.rs. Add
enabled_builtin_workflows() and apply workflow_enabled() checks
consistently: build_workflow_by_name filters by enabled status,
register_builtin_workflows only registers enabled workflows, workflow
list shows only enabled with correct count. Tighten handles() on
HandleUsageLimits to use exact match lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
